# Pull Request

## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them.  
Include relevant context and any issues this PR resolves.

Fixes # (issue)

---

## Type of Change
Please check the options that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / Code cleanup

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project’s style guidelines (TS, ESLint, Prettier)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] I have added/updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have tested both the **backend** (Express TS) and **frontend** (Next.js)

---

## Backend Notes (Express + TS)

- [ ] Database migrations (if applicable)
- [ ] Prisma model changes documented
- [ ] API endpoints tested with Postman / Insomnia / automated tests
- [ ] Authentication / authorization flows verified

---

## Frontend Notes (Next.js)

- [ ] Pages / Components tested
- [ ] Forms validated
- [ ] State management updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API integration tested

---

## Screenshots / GIFs (if applicable)

Include screenshots, GIFs, or video demos to show UI changes or API responses.

---

## Additional Comments

Add any extra information or context here for reviewers.
